summary: Iteration 84 - Cashfree Webhook & CRM Tab Reorganization Testing Complete. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Book Solar Service uses Cashfree payment flow, CRM Dashboard has reorganized tabs (Lead Management, HR Management, Security Centre).
critical_code_review_comments: CRM Dashboard tab reorganization properly implemented with LeadManagementSection, HRManagementSection, SecurityCentreSection components
Book Solar Service modal correctly uses Cashfree payment API instead of QR code
Webhook endpoint has proper idempotency checking and signature verification

success_rate.frontend: 100% (verified via code review and partial UI testing)

seed_data_creation: Test payment links created during webhook testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cashfree webhook endpoint at /api/payments/cashfree/webhook fully functional with PAYMENT_SUCCESS, PAYMENT_FAILED, PAYMENT_USER_DROPPED event handling. Website payment flow at /api/payments/website/initiate and /api/payments/website/verify/{order_id} working. CRM Dashboard tabs reorganized: Lead Management (All Leads + Trash), HR Management (Team + Tasks), Security Centre (Backups). Admin login requires real OTP which blocks automated UI testing of CRM Dashboard.

features_verified.POST /api/payments/cashfree/webhook - PA: WORKING - Updates payment status to paid, updates lead stage to converted
WORKING - Logs failure and updates payment status
features_verified.POST /api/payments/cashfree/webhook - id: WORKING - Returns 200 even on invalid/duplicate data
features_verified.POST /api/payments/website/initiate: WORKING - Creates Cashfree payment link for website booking
features_verified.GET /api/payments/webhook-url: WORKING - Returns webhook URL and instructions
features_verified.CRM Dashboard Lead Management tab: VERIFIED - Contains All Leads + Trash subtabs (line 2254, 2413)
features_verified.Book Solar Service Cashfree flow: VERIFIED - Uses /api/payments/website/initiate instead of QR code (line 1107)

webhook_features.idempotency: Implemented - checks payment_webhook_logs for duplicate processing
webhook_features.auto_whatsapp_confirmation: Implemented - sends confirmation on successful payment
webhook_features.lead_stage_update: Implemented - updates lead to 'converted' on payment success
